response.justification: Wei Chen is a capable polyglot engineer with a long career spanning embedded systems, mobile, web, and distributed services, but the resume shows no meaningful alignment with the core requirements of this role. There is zero evidence of experimentation platform work, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or growth engineering. The high-volume distributed systems experience at Sociomantic is notable but now 6+ years old and narrowly scoped to data integration rather than measurement or experimentation. The candidate is operating at a Staff/Senior IC level in full-stack product work, which falls short of the Principal/IC6 bar with cross-team systemic impact this role demands.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic) demonstrates comfort with scale
Genuinely polyglot across C, C++, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, and D — covers the required language breadth
Long track record of technical community contribution (workshops, open source projects, conference talks) signals growth mindset and communication skills
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout infrastructure experience anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics pipelines, or data analysis work — a foundational gap for a role built around measurement systems
Career trajectory is generalist full-stack rather than platform/infrastructure, with no demonstrated cross-team systemic impact at Principal scope

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
